Home | 
Application Managed Services 
Application Managed Services 

We take care of your critical enterprise applications while you focus on your core business and processes 

Applettek’s application managed services are provided leveraging proven methodology, automated tools, and experienced team of resources, which enable us to reduce costs, improve quality and provide better service to the business users in terms of responsiveness, performance, and reliability. 
Our consultants come with in-depth knowledge, understanding and expertise working with various leading technologies including but not limited to Oracle ERP, PeopleSoft, Ellucian Banner, Oracle Cloud, Oracle OBIEE, Workday, SAP, Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, RPA (UiPath, Automation Anywhere), OCR (ABBYY), Oracle DBA, SQL Server DBA, Crystal Reports, Date Warehouse, to name a few. 

We have expertise in providing managed services for leading Enterprise Applications. 

Services 

Key Highlights of our Application Managed Services (AMS) 

Stay Updated 
Our dedicated team of resources ensures that your application stays current with patches and updates rolled out in an efficient fashion leveraging various tools including test automation. 

Additional Documentation & Training 
We provide enhanced documentation and training services on-demand basis to facilitate quick user adoption of new/enhanced features. 

Solutions Enhancements 
We work closely with you to monitor the value from implemented enhancements and plan for continuous solution improvements. 

Value Assessments 
We continuously assess and identify all possible enhancements, prioritize them based on value and present the same for your review and approval. 

Thought Leadership 
We bring to the table our thought Leadership in developing and operating service delivery capability for infrastructure and application management. 

Access to Center of Excellence 
You have access to our established Centre of Excellence for AMS solutions and a complete spectrum of AMS solutions services, in addition to ITIL. 

Optimum Service Delivery 
You get to enjoy reduced risk by adopting best practices and improving overall IT service delivery capability – accelerating time to IT business value. 

Lower TCO 
Our Application Managed Services focus on lowering your total cost of ownership (TCO) of enterprise applications. 

Stay informed, subscribe to our newsletter 

Subscribe Now

Job description Requirements 

Network Security Analyst 
Applettek 

Quick Apply Apply Now 

Full Time 

Hyderabad 

Posted 3 years ago 

Job description 
The purpose of this position is to primarily carry out Operations and Support of all network and security systems and resources for a global enterprise infrastructure 
EgonZehnder is looking for a Network Engineer that can thrive in a challenging and fast paced environment 
This role requires a technical expert with sharp skills in technologies such as Dynamic Routing Protocols, LAN switches, Firewall configuration, SSL and IPSec VPN configuration etc 
Responsibilities 
Responsible for managing LAN, WAN Manage and support a global LAN, WAN infrastructure primarily comprising of Cisco Routers and Switches. Designing and implementing new solutions and maintaining the highest possible uptime. 
Responsible for managing a Global Wireless Infrastructure Comprising Wireless LAN controllers, LWAPs in each offices and all associated infrastructure 
Responsible for managing the Global VoIP and IP Video Conferencing infrastructure Comprising Cisco Call Managers, Unity Connection, VCS Control, Expressway, VC Endpoints, Cisco IP phones, Zoom, MS Teams 
Job Features

Analyst

Home | 
ERP Services 
ERP Services 

Streamline your business processes and improve efficiencies with Applettek's
ERP services 

Applettek goal of ERP software solutions is to streamline and integrate back-office business processes and facilitate the flow of information within your organization so business decisions can be data-driven and efficiency can be improved. 

Applettek has well-defined and proven processes, methodologies and domain-specific knowledge that enable us to offer a comprehensive range of services in core ERP modules/areas: 

Human Resources/Human Capital Management 

Financials Management (FCM) 

Supply Chain Management (SCM) 

Customer Relationship Management (CRM) 

Enterprise Performance Management (EPM) 

Enterprise Learning Management (ELM) 

Student Information System (SIS) 

We have expertise in leading ERP technologies. 

Services 

Appletteks Comprehensive Suite of ERP Services 

ERP Project Recovery 
In the event of your ERP Project Implementation failing, we can develop a project recovery roadmap that defines short-term and long-term changes needed to get it back on track. 

ERP Health Check 
We will review your existing ERP application to identify areas where improvement is needed to deliver an optimal system that aligns with your business needs and complies with industry best practices. 

Cloud Migrations 
We help you move from legacy ERP systems to cloud based ERP solutions with the right strategy, planning and seamless execution. 

Post Go Live Support & Monitoring 
Our Post Live Support includes 24/7 monitoring to ensure your ERP solution and business applications run smoothly and efficiently, while also identifying the areas of continuous improvements. 

Customizations & Integrations 
We can quickly build and deploy the required customizations as well as the integrations ensuring seamless data exchange between your ERP application and various internal/external systems. 

ERP Project Implementation 
We have the resources, methodologies and experience to implement the chosen ERP software and configure it to meet your specific business requirements. 

ERP Software Selection 
We can fast track your ERP software selection by analyzing and recommending the best suited ERP solution(s) that completely aligns with your business needs and goals. 

Technology Assessment 
We will review the hardware and business applications you use and determine how useful they are as part of your future IT strategy.

Home | 
Mobile Applications 
Mobile Applications 

We help you build mobile app solutions to meet the business, industry, and end users' specific needs 

Applettek offers Mobile App development services to help you reach out to wider user base, or as part of your business process automation and/or simply to improve user experience. We create user-friendly and engaging mobile app solutions that cater to your specific business needs. We have a dedicated team of mobile app developers who can help you develop apps for your employees, customers, and partner network. We know how to explore the unlimited possibilities that mobile technologies offer these days. We have expertise in both native and cross platform apps. 

We have expertise in building mobile apps for every user, platform, and industry. 

Services 

Key Highlights of our Mobile App Services 

Marketing 
Our digital marketing executives know how to promote the apps across various social media platforms. We also provide backlinks of your app if required to increase the number of installations of the app. 

Maintenance & Optimization 
Even after the launch, we would add advanced features if required and fix bugs, in case of any glitches. 

Launch 
Right from taking your app to the store to its success, we stay with you. We take care of every step right from app building to its launch. 

Integration 
Applettek will help you integrate the app with the web or any device without any extra effort. A specially designed plugin will be made available with which you can even integrate the third-party services on your app as per your needs. 

Customized Mobility Solutions 
We work with multiple ecosystems to develop custom mobility solutions – native mobile apps, mobile web apps or hybrid apps – based on your business needs. 

Thorough Testing 
Now say good-bye to the apps that lag and eat your time and memory as we at Applettek roll out mobile apps that are steadfast and consumes less space. Our geeks work round the clock and test every functionality to avoid hiccups to the end users. 

UX and UI Design 
Right from prototype to fluid design, our designers will experiment with every single interface before they present before you for the final sign off. Our apps have stellar visual appeal and catch the user attention right away. 

Planning & Strategy 
Our team would sit with you to discuss ideas, jot down your expectations and chalk out a strategy that will be beneficial to your business for years ahead. Based on the same ideas and your industry, we would build the apps.

Home | 
Oracle Cloud Applications 
Oracle Cloud Applications 

We are your partners in building your business with the next-generation Oracle Cloud Applications. 

“Becoming a resilient company involves adopting change and preparing for all eventualities, which might at first seem challenging, yet the rewards are great.” Doug Kehring, Executive Vice President, Oracle Corporate Operations. 

We, at Applettek, cannot agree more. We are helping our customers adopt enterprise-wide digital transformation by implementing Oracle cloud applications – the world’s leading comprehensive and best- connected suite of SaaS applications that covers every aspect of your business – finance, supply chain, human capital, customer experience, to name a few.Applettek can be the right cloud partner for your business and help you reap the benefits of Oracle cloud applications. 

Core Services and Competencies 

Cloud Assessment 

✓Two (2) weeks of free advisory or assessment of your current applications ecosystem for Cloud transformation 
✓Recommendations 

Oracle Cloud Applications 

✓Oracle ERP—Financials Cloud 
✓Oracle HCM Cloud 
✓Oracle SCM and Manufacturing Cloud 
✓Oracle Data Cloud 
✓Oracle Business Intelligence Cloud 
✓CX – Sales, Marketing & Service Cloud 
✓Oracle EPM Cloud 

Cloud Transformation 

✓E-Business Suite 
✓PeopleSoft 
✓SAP 
✓Hyperion 
✓Other Enterprise Apps 

Cloud Integrations 

✓On-Premise Applications 
✓Third-party Systems and Data Sources 
✓Oracle Database / DBaaS 
✓Oracle Integration Cloud 

Oracle Unified Methodology 

✓Experience with OUM phases for cloud deployments 
✓Create plans and deliverables recommended by OUM 

Automation 

✓Data Migration to Cloud using proven Proprietary Tool 
✓Execute Testing over Cloud using Task – our proven Test Automation Suite 
✓Deliver Integrations efficiently using Integration Automation Tool 

Applettek Differentiators 

Extensive experience in all stages of project lifecycle such as Configurations, Data Loading, CRP’s, UAT’s, Go-Live, and Post-Production Support & Maintenance 

Working with higher education, public sector agencies, government, healthcare, insurance, banking, fleet, manufacturing, automobile, energy, and oil & gas Industries 

Center of Excellence – Ongoing initiatives with Oracle Cloud such as home-grown Test Automation scripts, Data Migration tools, Mobile integrations, Accelerated implementation/ upgrade programs etc 

Detailed case study documents prepared on functional and technical aspects for Oracle Cloud practice 

Oracle Principal Partner; 

ISO, CMMI 3, ITIL – driven processes 

Blended delivery model (onsite, remote – onshore, nearshore and offshore) for cost effective engagements 

Rapid deployment methodology for quicker ROI 

24/7 support model

privacy-policy.text:
hr@applettek.com

Get In Touch 

Call Now +125 (895) 658 568 

Quick Email info.help@gmail.com 

Office Address PV3M+X68 Welshpool United Kingdom 

Home | 
Privacy Policy 
Privacy Policy 

Who we are 
Suggested text: Our website address is: https://applettek.com. 
Comments 
Suggested text: When visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection. 
An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment. 
Media 
Suggested text: If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website. 
Cookies 
Suggested text: If you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year. 
If you visit our login page, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser. 
When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select “Remember Me”, your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed. 
If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day. 
Embedded content from other websites 
Suggested text: Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website. 
These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website. 
Who we share your data with 
Suggested text: If you request a password reset, your IP address will be included in the reset email. 
How long we retain your data 
Suggested text: If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue. 
For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information. 
What rights you have over your data 
Suggested text: If you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes. 
Where your data is sent 
Suggested text: Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.

SAP 

We help you create distinctive capabilities and simplify complex processes for business success. 

Applettek offers a wide range of application life cycle services that organizations need to realize the full potential of the SAP business suite. We believe that our extensive experience in SAP consulting services, proven and mature project management methodology, and in-depth understanding of SAP landscape make us an ideal SAP consulting partner for any organization looking to maximize their ROI on SAP. 
We have experienced SAP consultants who can assess your current SAP environment and compare against SAP best practices and benchmarks, discuss current pain points and provide recommendations for better system utilization & future expansion.

Blended delivery model (onsite, and remote – onshore and offshore) for cost effective engagements 

Our Flex-Sourcing model is an intelligent staffing strategy that converts fixed expenses to variable costs enabling ramp-up and ramp-down based on Load and Economic Cycles. 

Our Extended employee model requires almost no supervision from client and leverages Run SAP methodology, processes and structures to ensure high quality 

Our rotational schedule allows for shifting employees work times every 3-4 weeks to keep them incentivized to perform at their peak on a regular consistent basis where customers adopt the 24X7 model 

We also provide Strategic Consulting Services to assist you in other areas such as Master Data and Governance, Business Transformation, Training, etc

Home | 
Web Development 
Web Development 

With our expertise in delivering advanced web-based solutions, we help your business succeed 

Applettek has decade long experience in developing web-based solutions that can meet your business needs and help you strengthen your online presence and grow your customer base. All our web-based solutions are built using the latest technologies and feature highly intuitive design, user-friendly UI, elegant interfaces, and exceptional performance. 

We have expertise in full stack development skills. 

Services 

Key Highlights of our Web Development Services 

Maintenance & Optimization 
We will add new features, apply updates, as needed, conduct security scans and eradicate malware and spam. We will ensure your web applications remain useful, productive, secure and relevant. 

Launch 
We will collaborate with you closely right from building the web-based solution to its launch. We review rollout procedures with you prior to deployment to ensure a smooth go-live. 

Integration 
We can deliver standalone web applications or deliver a solution that is integrated with payment gateways, ERP applications, CRM, online forms, calendar events, and various BI and analytics tools. 

Extensive Quality Assurance 
Our teams will perform extensive quality assurance (QA) testing to make sure all pages and links are stable, secure, error free and optimized for performance. 

UX and UI Design 
Right from prototype to fluid design and responsiveness, our designers will experiment with every single interface before they present before you for the final sign off. We can use pre-built templates or create custom UI based on your needs. 

Collaborative Approach 
Our team sits with you to understand your specific business needs and customer base to design and build websites that are fast, easy-to-use and attracts online visitors.
